description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with five evenly spaced horizontal shelves supported by a minimalist frame. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with thin vertical and horizontal supports creating an open, airy design. The shelves themselves are solid and flat, likely made of metal or a similar sturdy material, and are finished in a glossy black color. The open sides and back allow for easy access and visibility of items placed on the shelves. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces. There are no visible doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, emphasizing its function as an open storage or display unit.
description: A tall, open-frame shelving unit with five glossy black metal shelves and a minimalist, modern design. The structure is open on all sides, providing easy access and visibility.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five shelves and the open, rectangular frame structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile and depth of the shelves, with the open frame visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open shelves and supporting frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and open construction.
